{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032401151416907FB650F96A84537B"}"},"total":58},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7566536773806146328","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以可以，写的不错，不舔圣人也不舔女娲，人族灭的时候也不见他出现，为什么就要向她献殷勤呢？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761725132,"group_id":"7557688220612299801","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写书写的不好看，被骂受着吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxWtYFCxJy6ZDdbO/yA/BISPd1rNYx/tuUOSfFwjgLBM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7606a1011c9b459094a320bbb7d7d7bc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878600&x-signature=9nyunKK7GwcjiyzzvysI86spjrQ%3D","user_id":"4251143707309594","user_name":"君子无爭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4251143707309594","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7557688220612299801","book_info":{"abstract":"好消息：我穿越了，成了大商的王。
坏消息：我是帝辛，明天就要去女娲宫上香。
更坏的消息：这事我干了九十九次了，次次BE。
第一世，我兢兢业业，结果：鹿台自焚。
第十世，我跪地求饶，结果：被做成肉饼。
第五十三世，我躺平摆烂，结果：被妖魔分食。
第九十九世，我直接掀桌子骂圣人，结果：被天雷轰得渣都不剩。
……
第一百世，我累了，毁灭吧。
面对女娲圣像，我以血为墨，写下八个大字：“人道永昌，百无禁忌！”
（写完我就准备等死了）
结果：女娲圣像裂了，圣人被反噬吐血了，天机被屏蔽了。
诸天圣人：“？？？剧本拿错了？谁家的人王这么猛？！”
不是，这一世的展开怎么跟说好的不一样？！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/83276cc658be02cdfc9e072fd262cb33","author":"一碗烧刀酒","author_id":"","book_id":"7557688220612299801","book_name":"封神：开局拒题淫诗，女娲像炸了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7557688267454300697","read_count":"15217","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"911701"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"349","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,重生,诸天万界,封神","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/33c48ac2553ef2ac9a2421602f913a44~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779470114&x-signature=pzrftNzFc6PCDUiZOuyStXP8YfM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1121156942533283","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"80"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032401151416907FB650F96A84537B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读42分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"liste
